name: Cream Cheese Snickers Candy Bar Pie
recipeIngredient: 6 1-1/2 oz Snickers Bars, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs.
2. Sprinkle the gelatin over cold water in a small saucepan and let stand until softened, about 4 minutes. Dissolve over very low heat, stirring.
3. Melt candy bars in the top of a double boiler over simmering water; add peanut butter and blend with a wooden spoon until smooth. Cool.
4. Beat cream cheese with 2 egg yolks thoroughly. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating well.
5. Blend in cocoa, evaporated milk, vanilla, candy bar mix, and then the dissolved gelatin. Mix all well.
6. Chill until partially thickened, stirring occasionally.
7. Whisk room temperature egg whites with salt until stiff peaks form.
8. Fold into the chilled mixture, then fold in whipped heavy cream.
9. Turn into the cooled pastry shell and chill until firm.
10. Decorate with chopped peanuts and additional whipped cream if desired.
